positive: A detailed, stylized mandala design featuring intertwined celestial elements, ancient foliage, and mythical constellations. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, designed for seamless repetition on fabric. Use a sophisticated color palette of deep indigo, teal, shimmering gold foil accents, and cream white. The style should be a blend of geometric Art Deco linework and delicate bioluminescent nature motifs, achieving a high-contrast, tattoo-sheet quality silhouette. The illustration must have crisp edges, perfect symmetry, and appear as a vector graphic print. Studio lighting, highly detailed linework, clean background isolation, intricate mandala art, ready for textile printing.
